zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Monfort於大約1057年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾時，她的父親Simon de Montfort33歲，母親Agnès d'Évereux13歲。她於大約1076年與Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche在法國i萊-德-福朗斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1147年7月在法國艾-吉洛易德享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Monfort于大约1057年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort33岁，母亲Agnès d'Évereux13岁。她于大约1076年与Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche在法国i萊-德-福朗斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1147年7月在法国艾-吉洛易德享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .
English: variant of   Mount  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobel
meanings: Variant spelling of   Isabel .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Monfort was born about 1057, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Simon de Montfort, was 33 and her mother, Agnès d'Évereux, was 13. She married Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche about 1076, in Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in July 1147, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Monfort est née environ 1057, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Simon de Montfort, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Évereux, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche environ 1076, à Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en juillet 1147, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Monfort um 1057 in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort 33 und ihre Mutter Agnès d'Évereux 13. Sie hat um 1076 in Île-de-France, Frankreich Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Juli 1147 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Monfort è nata il circa 1057 nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Montfort, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Agnès d'Évereux, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche circa 1076, nel Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel luglio 1147, nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Monfortが約1057年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfortは33歳，母Agnès d'Évereuxは13歳であった。約1076年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスでRaoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Oucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1147年7月にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Monfort(이)가 대략 1057년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès d'Évereux(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1076년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스에서 Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 7월 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Monfort nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Évereux, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche aproximadamente 1076, em Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em julho de 1147, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Monfort родилась около 1057 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Évereux, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche около 1076 г. в местности iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла июль 1147 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Monfort nació aproximadamente 1057, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Évereux, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Raoul III de Tosny seigneur de Conches-en-Ouche aproximadamente 1076, en Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en julio de 1147, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 91 años.
